ideas.name: Airbnb
ideas.description: Marketplace for people to rent spare rooms and homes to travelers; reputation and reviews build trust between strangers.
ideas.outcome_notes: Supply+demand liquidity and global scale; long regulatory battles.

ideas.name: Uber
ideas.description: On-demand ride-hailing app matching drivers and riders; dynamic pricing and surge during peak demand.
ideas.outcome_notes: Won liquidity in many cities; fierce regulatory and labor tension.

ideas.name: Dropbox
ideas.description: Dead-simple cloud folder sync across devices; referral loop for growth.
ideas.outcome_notes: Reliable UX and distribution; later enterprise expansion.

ideas.name: Slack
ideas.description: Team chat replacing email for internal comms; integrations and search as moat narrative.
ideas.outcome_notes: Enterprise land-and-expand; crowded category now.

ideas.name: Stripe
ideas.description: Developer-first payments API; onboarding in minutes for internet businesses.
ideas.outcome_notes: Default choice for many startups; breadth of financial products.

ideas.name: Shopify
ideas.description: Hosted store builder and app ecosystem for merchants.
ideas.outcome_notes: SMB scale; partner AND consumer brand risk.

ideas.name: Notion
ideas.description: All-in-one wiki, docs, and databases for teams; viral templates community.
ideas.outcome_notes: PLG and community; competing with Microsoft/Google.

ideas.name: Figma
ideas.description: Browser-native collaborative UI design; multiplayer editing.
ideas.outcome_notes: Network effects inside product orgs; acquired by Adobe.

ideas.name: Zoom
ideas.description: Frictionless video meetings; breakout rooms and webinars at scale.
ideas.outcome_notes: COVID pull-forward; churn when offices normalize.

ideas.name: Calendly
ideas.description: Self-serve scheduling links that sync calendars and reduce email ping-pong.
ideas.outcome_notes: Clear wedge; Salesforce calendaring as competition.

ideas.name: Mailchimp
ideas.description: Email marketing for SMBs; freemium and creative brand.
ideas.outcome_notes: Long profitable bootstrap; intense category pressure.

ideas.name: Basecamp
ideas.description: Small-team project basecamp: tasks, messages, files in one calm product.
ideas.outcome_notes: Profitable niche; refused VC hypergrowth.

ideas.name: Loom
ideas.description: Quick screen+cam videos for async updates at work.
ideas.outcome_notes: PLG motion; acquired by Atlassian.

ideas.name: Superhuman
ideas.description: Fast email client for power users; concierge onboarding and $30/mo pricing.
ideas.outcome_notes: Brand and cult; limited TAM vs Gmail/Outlook.

ideas.name: Roam Research
ideas.description: Networked note-taking with bi-directional links for researchers and founders.
ideas.outcome_notes: Cult following; competition from Notion/Obsidian.

ideas.name: Peloton
ideas.description: Connected bike and tread with live and on-demand classes.
ideas.outcome_notes: Pandemic boom then demand normalization and debt.

ideas.name: Bird
ideas.description: Dockless electric scooters dropped in cities; per-minute rental.
ideas.outcome_notes: Unit economics and city regulation killed many peers.

ideas.name: Casper
ideas.description: Mattress-in-a-box sold online with free returns and heavy performance marketing.
ideas.outcome_notes: CAC and category commoditization; IPO struggles.

ideas.name: Groupon
ideas.description: Daily deals for local merchants; email list as distribution.
ideas.outcome_notes: Explosive early growth; merchant fatigue and margin collapse.

ideas.name: Zynga
ideas.description: Social games on Facebook with virtual goods monetization.
ideas.outcome_notes: Platform dependency on Facebook; hit-driven.

ideas.name: Quora
ideas.description: Q&A platform with follows and feeds; knowledge community.
ideas.outcome_notes: Engagement vs monetization tension; slow revenue story.

ideas.name: Webvan
ideas.description: Same-day grocery delivery with massive warehouse buildout pre-internet scale.
ideas.outcome_notes: Capital intensity and wrong timing; burned billions.

ideas.name: Pets.com
ideas.description: Online pet supplies with mascot-driven brand and Super Bowl ads.
ideas.outcome_notes: Negative unit economics; bubble poster child.

ideas.name: WeWork
ideas.description: Flexible office leases packaged as tech with community and design.
ideas.outcome_notes: Governance and S-1; real estate risk masked as software.

ideas.name: Juicero
ideas.description: $400 Wi-Fi juicer with DRM juice packs; squeeze by hand worked too.
ideas.outcome_notes: No real technical moat; ridiculed value prop.

ideas.name: Quibi
ideas.description: Short-form mobile video by Hollywood names; subscription.
ideas.outcome_notes: Wrong format for lockdown; no organic distribution.

ideas.name: Theranos
ideas.description: Finger-prick blood tests with lab-in-a-box claims.
ideas.outcome_notes: Fraud; science never worked at claimed level.

ideas.name: Nikola
ideas.description: Hydrogen and electric trucks; tech story for public markets.
ideas.outcome_notes: Fraud allegations; demo truck rolled downhill.

ideas.name: Clubhouse
ideas.description: Drop-in audio rooms with FOMO invites; celebrity rooms.
ideas.outcome_notes: Fad spike; copied by every platform; retention collapsed.

ideas.name: BeReal
ideas.description: Once-a-day photo prompt to show authentic life; anti-Instagram narrative.
ideas.outcome_notes: Viral teen burst; unclear retention and monetization.

ideas.name: Yik Yak
ideas.description: Anonymous hyperlocal college feed.
ideas.outcome_notes: Bullying and safety killed trust; reboot failed to scale.

ideas.name: Vine
ideas.description: 6-second looping videos; creator culture genesis.
ideas.outcome_notes: Twitter shutdown; TikTok absorbed format.

ideas.name: Friendster
ideas.description: Early social graph and profiles before Facebook dominated.
ideas.outcome_notes: Scaling issues and poor product velocity.

ideas.name: Myspace
ideas.description: Customizable profiles and music for teens and bands.
ideas.outcome_notes: Facebook ate social graph; messy ads and UX.

ideas.name: Google+
ideas.description: Google identity layer plus social circles and posts.
ideas.outcome_notes: Forced integrations backfired; no habit loop vs incumbents.

ideas.name: Jet.com
ideas.description: Membership e-commerce challenging Amazon on price.
ideas.outcome_notes: Acquired by Walmart; original model unsustainable alone.

ideas.name: Homejoy
ideas.description: On-demand home cleaning matching independent cleaners.
ideas.outcome_notes: Labor classification and churn; unit economics.

ideas.name: Exec (errand marketplace)
ideas.description: Book hourly assistants for errands and tasks.
ideas.outcome_notes: Thin margins and operational complexity.

ideas.name: Foursquare
ideas.description: Check-ins and venue tips; pivoted to location data business.
ideas.outcome_notes: Consumer app stalled; B2B data became core.

ideas.name: Niche vet practice software
ideas.description: Scheduling, records, and payments for independent veterinary clinics in one US region.
ideas.outcome_notes: Boring SaaS can win with channel partners and compliance depth.

ideas.name: SMB payroll for restaurants
ideas.description: Payroll and tips compliance for single-location restaurants; sold via accountants.
ideas.outcome_notes: High stickiness; sales-led and regulation moat.

ideas.name: ChatGPT for Slack (wrapper)
ideas.description: Thin Slack bot calling OpenAI API for summarize thread and draft replies; no proprietary data or workflow lock-in.
ideas.outcome_notes: Native tools and incumbents integrate same models.

ideas.name: Generic web UI for SDXL
ideas.description: Public gallery + credits for image generation API; no community or model fine-tune.
ideas.outcome_notes: Commoditized; only winners had distribution or quality bar.

ideas.name: Materials marketplace for contractors
ideas.description: Two-sided marketplace matching small contractors with regional suppliers; trust and logistics heavy.
ideas.outcome_notes: Cold start and thin margins common in construction verticals.

ideas.name: Social network for book quotes
ideas.description: Share highlights and follow readers; ads later.
ideas.outcome_notes: Narrow frequency; Goodreads and TikTok capture attention.

ideas.name: Developer API gateway startup
ideas.description: Managed API gateway with rate limits, auth, and analytics for internal microservices.
ideas.outcome_notes: Category exists; winners bundle with cloud or security story.

ideas.name: OSS metrics and traces bootstrap
ideas.description: Open core observability with hosted managed offering for Kubernetes shops.
ideas.outcome_notes: Bottom-up dev adoption; cloud bill alignment.

ideas.name: Ultra-fast fashion mobile app
ideas.description: Daily new SKUs, China supply chain, aggressive performance ads to Gen Z.
ideas.outcome_notes: Regulatory and ESG backlash; logistics scale.

ideas.name: 15-minute grocery dark stores
ideas.description: Urban micro-fulfillment promising sub-15-minute delivery for convenience basket.
ideas.outcome_notes: Many markets saw consolidation; unit economics brutal.

ideas.name: NFT-gated social club
ideas.description: Discord-like community where membership is an NFT; token for governance.
ideas.outcome_notes: Speculation cycle; thin utility beyond status.

ideas.name: B2B carbon credit marketplace
ideas.description: Match project developers with corporate buyers; MRV and registry integrations.
ideas.outcome_notes: Trust and fraud in offsets; long enterprise sales.

ideas.name: D2C teletherapy matching
ideas.description: Match users with licensed therapists over video; takes insurance in some states.
ideas.outcome_notes: Regulatory per state; competition from incumbents and payers.

ideas.name: Rent-to-own starter homes
ideas.description: Help renters build equity toward purchase; complex legal structure per market.
ideas.outcome_notes: Interest rate and housing cycle sensitivity.

ideas.name: Cobot-mounted QC for automotive Tier-2
ideas.description: Vision model on a cobot arm checks weld seams on the line; integrates with plant MES for scrap tagging and PPAP evidence packs.
ideas.outcome_notes: Integration hours and buy-off cycles dominate; ROI needs scrap dollars proof.

ideas.name: MES analytics at the edge
ideas.description: On-prem gateway aggregates PLC historians into shift-level OEE dashboards without sending raw video off-site.
ideas.outcome_notes: Security story sells when OT teams gate cloud.

ideas.name: Prior authorization copilot
ideas.description: Pulls payer rules and builds PA packets inside Epic workflows for specialty clinics.
ideas.outcome_notes: Reimbursement volatility and payer rule churn.

ideas.name: Embedded payroll cards for hourly workers
ideas.description: Issue branded payroll cards through sponsor bank with instant wage access and fraud monitoring.
ideas.outcome_notes: Regulatory drag and interchange compression.

ideas.name: Latency-optimized LLM serving
ideas.description: Runs quantized models on shared GPU clusters with autoscaling and eval regression gates for prod prompts.
ideas.outcome_notes: GPU economics brutal; winners bundle reliability.

ideas.name: Cross-dock coordination for regional 3PL
ideas.description: Slot dock appointments and yard coordination so trailers don't idle; integrates WMS and carrier APIs.
ideas.outcome_notes: Ops-heavy; pilots site-specific.

ideas.name: K-12 competency tracking LMS
ideas.description: District-wide competency maps with teacher dashboards; sells through curriculum coordinators.
ideas.outcome_notes: Long cycles; budget sensitivity.

ideas.name: MRV tooling for industrial emitters
ideas.description: Meter data + emission factors into audit-ready reports for EU carbon accounting teams.
ideas.outcome_notes: Trust and methodology fights in offsets adjacent markets.

ideas.name: Yield analytics for fab test floors
ideas.description: Correlates bin maps across testers to catch drift earlier; on-prem deployment behind fab firewall.
ideas.outcome_notes: Design wins with fabs; long qualification.

ideas.name: SOC alert clustering
ideas.description: Clusters noisy EDR alerts into incident narratives with rollback hooks for playbooks.
ideas.outcome_notes: False positive reduction must prove in parallel runs.
